episodes.title: Attorney With 30 Years Experience Questions DOJ's Competence | Epstein Deep Dive
episodes.description: In this video, Attorney John Mobley offers a legal analysis of the current administration's Department of Justice (DOJ), questioning their competence and intent. With over 30 years in his law career, Mobley brings a seasoned perspective to the discussion on us politics and the administration of justice. This timely segment provides insights into the latest news, drawing from his extensive experience in complex civil and criminal cases.
